---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for PinIt
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
The use case or pain point behind the request.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like PinIt to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

> Note: PinIt aims to stay small and single-purpose (keep windows on top). Features
> that fit that focus are most likely to be accepted.
